generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature sensor deployed in building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor for detecting presence in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light intensity sensor for measuring ambient light levels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light intensity measurements from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator for temperature and airflow control"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system controller for adjusting brightness and color temperature"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsForMaintenance
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and device registry"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for high-fidelity 3D visualization and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Revit for BIM model creation and semantic enrichment"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelCreationService
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with device-specific metadata for Building Control Systems (BCS), including geometric, spatial, and functional data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Revit, EclipseDitto
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time monitoring of building operations using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsagePattern, ComfortLevelInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of energy consumption based on real-time data and predictive models"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsForMaintenance : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for equipment maintenance using sensor data and historical trends"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlert
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building assets using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualModelInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting control balancing energy, comfort, and health"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustLightingAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustment of lighting and shading for optimal visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation of building operations for scenario analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResult
]

instance BIMModelCreationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creation of BIM models with semantic enrichment using Revit"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelReady
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringProcess : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated extraction of BIM semantics and model-to-text transformations for runtime interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeInterfaceGeneration
]

instance EnergyUsagePattern : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of energy consumption patterns for operational optimization"
]

instance ComfortLevelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of thermal and visual comfort levels based on sensor data"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Early warning of potential equipment failures for proactive maintenance"
]

instance EnergySavingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified opportunities for reducing energy consumption"
]

instance VisualModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of building assets for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized visual comfort settings based on environmental conditions"
]

instance SimulationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from dynamic building operation simulations"
]

instance BIMModelReady : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "BIM model is ready for integration into digital twin operations"
]

instance RuntimeInterfaceGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime interfaces generated for service integration and evolution"
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting parameters using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building infrastructure as a virtual counterpart for real-time monitoring and optimization"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, HVACActuator, LightingController
]

instance ModularArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for decentralized component-specific twins"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting commands) transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to physical actuators and controllers for real-time adjustments of building systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data updates as physical sensor data is received, enabling immediate response to changes in the physical environment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented constellation where BIM serves as the semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and extensible service components for monitoring, simulation, and optimization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), with BIM serving as a semantic backbone for life cycle-encompassing optimization across design, construction, and operational stages, focusing on post-occupancy sensor data for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, with synchronization mechanisms to prevent semantic drift and ensure alignment between digital models and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between physical assets and digital twins through MQTT-based IoT connectivity and REST APIs."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external IoT platforms and building management systems via standardized protocols (MQTT, REST) using Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling data exchange beyond the digital twin system."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC), MQTT for IoT communication, and OASIS standards for Eclipse Hono and Ditto to ensure interoperability and consistent data exchange."
]
